title: TooltipRareness: Mythic Metals Compat
description: Adds compatibility with TooltipRareness and Mythic Metals.
body:
## Overview

This data pack simply adds compatibility with TooltipRareness and Mythic Metals.

Has built-in rarity for Alloy Forgery

### Installing Drop the data pack file into the `datapacks` folder inside your world. ### Rarity Table
Tier Material
Common Morkite, Tin
Uncommon Aquarium, Banglum, Bronze, Manganese, Midas Gold, Platinum, Silver, Steel, Quadrillum
Rare Adamantite, Carmot, Durasteel, Kyber, Mythril, Osmium, Palladium, Prometheum, Runite
Epic Orichalcum, Star Platinum, Stormyx, Starrite
Legendary Celestium, Hallowed, Legendary Banglum, Unobtanium
Mythical Metallurgium
These are subjective, so if you disagree with some of this, feel free to edit it inside the `tags` folder.
